summary: Frontend testing completed for FreeShippingBanner on Food pages. All 5 requested features verified working correctly: banner appears when adding food to cart, shows on /food main page after adding items, stays sticky when scrolling, dismisses when X is clicked, and shows correct remaining amount.
critical_code_review_comments: FreeShippingBanner.js correctly uses useFoodCart() hook to read food cart data directly from FoodCartContext
FoodCartContext.js properly calculates totalAmount and totalItems from localStorage food_cart_ entries
Banner is positioned after Header in App.js and uses sticky positioning (top-[56px]) to stay visible
Threshold is correctly read from settings?.free_shipping_threshold (150,000 SYP in current config)
Progress bar and remaining amount calculations are accurate
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing restaurant and products
context_for_next_testing_agent: FreeShippingBanner feature is fully working on food pages. Key data-testids: free-shipping-progress, free-shipping-celebration. Threshold = 150,000 SYP from /api/settings/public. Food cart stored in localStorage with key pattern food_cart_{storeId}

banner_appears_on_restaurant_page.details: Banner with data-testid='free-shipping-progress' appears immediately after adding item to food cart

banner_appears_on_food_main_page.details: Banner persists when navigating to /food main page - shows same remaining amount and progress

banner_sticky_on_scroll.details: Banner remains visible at top (sticky positioning) when scrolling down restaurant menu

banner_dismiss_button.details: Clicking X button dismisses banner - banner disappears from DOM

banner_shows_correct_remaining_amount.details: Threshold = 150,000 SYP. Item price = 25,000 SYP. Remaining = 125,000 SYP (displayed correctly). Progress = 17% (correct)

banner_not_shown_on_empty_cart.details: Banner does not appear when food cart is empty

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: شريط الشحن المجاني لا يظهر على صفحات الطعام عند إضافة عناصر لسلة الطعام
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: FreeShippingBanner rewritten to use useFoodCart() directly instead of separate state
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Banner now correctly shows on all food pages after adding items to food cart
